# AvökatFinder Finland
> The English-language directory of lawyers and law firms in Finland for expats, foreign nationals and international businesses.

## Main Pages
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/: Home — find an English-speaking lawyer in Finland
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/lawyers/: Directory of verified law firms and lawyers in Finland
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/: Legal glossary — plain-English definitions of Finland legal terms
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/blog/: Expat legal guides and property law articles for Finland
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/about/: About AvökatFinder Finland
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/contact/: Contact us

## Legal Glossary Terms
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/asunto-osakeyhtio/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/asuntokauppalaki/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/henkilotunnus/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/isannoitsijantodistus/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/kauppakirja-fi/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/kiinteistovero-fi/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/lainhuuto/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/myyntivoittovero-fi/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/osakasluettelo-fi/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/panttikirja-fi/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/rakennuslupa-fi/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/varainsiirtovero/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/yhtiojärjestys-fi/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/avioehtosopimus/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/oleskelulupa-fi/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/osakeyhtion-perustaminen/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/perunkirjoitus/
- https://finland.avokatfinder.com/glossary/tyosopimus-fi/

## Site Info
- Language: English
- Audience: Expats, foreign nationals, international property buyers and businesses in Finland
- Content: Law firm directory, legal glossary, expat legal guides
- Last updated: 2026-04-30
- Sitemap: https://finland.avokatfinder.com/sitemap.xml
